title: Our Team
subtitle: Meet the passionate professionals who make our excellence services possible and are committed to your success.

ceo.description: Solutions architect with experience across the full technology spectrum: from hardware and robotics to software and DevOps. As CEO and Founder, I lead ROKE with an obsession for technical excellence. I am a builder at heart, dedicated to creating reliable and scalable systems, from the smallest circuit to the largest cloud.

cto.description: Co-Founder and CTO of ROKE Industries. Rocío is the strategic mind that transforms business vision into robust and secure system architecture. As a Data Engineer, she leads our Business Intelligence initiatives and operational excellence, ensuring every ROKE product is built on an intelligent data foundation and enterprise-level security.

cta.title: Want to join our team?
cta.description: We are always looking for exceptional talent to strengthen our team. If you share our passion for technology and excellence, we would love to meet you.
